# Maritime apogee: Baghdad and Guangzhou, not Aachen {#sec-ch03}

> *The premodern Indian Ocean at its height — and Europe at its most peripheral.*

::: {.callout-note}
## Draft pending
**Period:** c.500–1000. This chapter is a stub. Draft it from the standardized template
(`_chapter-template.qmd`) using its story spine
(`teaching/ecu4413_world_econ/module_design/topic_03_story_spine_2026-06-19.md`), the matching topic brief, the
centre-of-gravity ledger, the data compendium, and `datasets_by_topic.md`.
:::
